items.title: Babar, Awais hit centuries and Mohammad Ali bags five-for in Pakistan's tour game
items.summary: Not all the Pakistan batters could make the most of the opportunity in Port of Spain ahead of the first Test against West Indies, which starts on July 25
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: David Warner pleads guilty to drink-driving, could face 9-month jail term and hefty fine
items.summary: David Warner admitted to a drink-driving charge after a random breath test in Sydney. His lawyer confirmed the former Australian cricketer accepted responsibility for his action...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Iraola wants Mac Allister & Alisson to stay with Reds
items.summary: Liverpool boss Andoni Iraola wants midfielder Alexis Mac Allister and goalkeeper Alisson to remain at the club.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
